name: Evertec Latin American Payment Technology REST API
what_it_does: Evertec Latin American payment technology REST API for banks, merchants, governments, and financial institutions across Puerto Rico, the Caribbean, and Latin America to process payments, manage ATM networks, enable digital wallets, and access payment analytics — enabling automated payment processing, ATH Móvil digital wallet integration, card processing, and financial transaction management through Evertec's payment technology platform serving 26 countries. Enables AI agents to manage payment processing for Caribbean and LATAM merchant transaction automation, handle ATH Movil for Puerto Rican digital wallet payment automation, access card issuing for credit/debit card program management automation, retrieve ATM network for cash dispensing and management automation, manage fraud detection for transaction risk scoring automation, handle merchant services for LATAM merchant acquiring automation, access loyalty for payment rewards program automation, retrieve payment analytics for financial transaction reporting automation, manage recurring billing for subscription payment automation, and integrate Evertec with banking core systems, government payment portals, and merchant platforms for LATAM payment infrastructure automation.
use_cases: Processing card payments for merchants across Puerto Rico, Caribbean, and Latin American markets automation agents
Integrating ATH Móvil digital wallet for Puerto Rican consumer payment acceptance automation agents
Managing ATM network operations and cash management for Caribbean bank automation agents
Accessing payment analytics and transaction reporting for LATAM financial institution automation agents
not_for: North American or European markets (Evertec is LATAM/Caribbean-focused payment technology)
Crypto or digital asset processing (Evertec is traditional payment rails and card networks)
Cross-border international wire transfers (Evertec focuses on domestic and regional LATAM card/digital payments)
best_when: A bank, merchant, or financial institution in Puerto Rico, the Caribbean, or Latin America wanting AI agents to process payments, integrate ATH Móvil digital wallet, manage ATM networks, and access payment analytics through Evertec's regional payment technology platform.
avoid_when: GEOGRAPHIC FOCUS IS LATAM/CARIBBEAN: Evertec primarily serves Puerto Rico, Caribbean islands, and Latin America; automated global payment assumption creates coverage_not_available for markets outside Evertec's network; automated must verify country coverage for specific LATAM/Caribbean markets. BANK AND FI PARTNERSHIP MODEL: Evertec works primarily through bank and financial institution partnerships; automated direct merchant API assumption creates requires_bank_partnership for non-FI entities; automated must establish bank or FI relationship for Evertec integration. ATH MOVIL IS PUERTO RICO SPECIFIC: ATH Móvil digital wallet is the Puerto Rican consumer wallet; automated pan-LATAM wallet assumption creates service_not_available for non-Puerto Rico Caribbean markets; automated must verify market availability for specific digital wallet features. REGULATORY VARIES BY COUNTRY: Payment regulations differ across 26 Evertec markets (PR/CFPB, Colombia/SFC, etc.); automated uniform-regulatory assumption creates compliance_gap for specific country requirements; automated must implement country-specific payment compliance.

auth.notes: Evertec uses API key + OAuth2 for payment REST API. REST API with JSON. San Juan, Puerto Rico HQ. Founded 1988 as part of Popular (Banco Popular). NYSE:EVTC. Products: ATH Móvil (digital wallet), SIGIS (government payments), card processing, ATM management, fraud prevention, merchant acquiring. SDKs: None public. 26 countries. 8M+ ATH Móvil users. 700+ clients. Competes with Kushki and PayU for LATAM payment processing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved banking partners; production requires Evertec partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction processing fees; ATM transaction fees; monthly platform fees; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: San Juan PR. NYSE:EVTC. Per-transaction fees. 26 countries. ATH Movil 8M+ users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and authorization APIs throttled per merchant/bank tier

known_agent_gotchas: ATH MOVIL REQUIRES MOBILE REDIRECT: ATH Móvil payments require consumer app redirect to Puerto Rican consumer mobile wallet; automated server-side-only payment assumption creates ATH_Movil_redirect_required; automated must implement mobile deep link to ATH Móvil consumer app

PAYMENT NETWORK ROUTING VARIES BY MARKET: Evertec routes payments through different local network rails by country (ATH in PR, local networks in Colombia, etc.); automated uniform-routing assumption creates routing_not_available in specific markets; automated must verify local payment network routing by country

GOVERNMENT PAYMENT INTEGRATION IS COMPLEX: SIGIS government payment system has separate integration requirements from commercial payments; automated same-endpoint government payments assumption creates SIGIS_configuration_required; automated must implement SIGIS-specific integration for Puerto Rican government payment acceptance

ATM MONITORING IS REAL-TIME: Evertec ATM network monitoring uses event-driven architecture; automated batch ATM status assumption creates delayed alerts for cash-out or device failures; automated must implement Evertec event subscriptions for real-time ATM network management

FRAUD SCORING REQUIRES CONTEXT: Evertec fraud detection uses merchant category, geography, and velocity; automated minimal-context fraud submission creates lower scoring accuracy; automated must include full transaction context for optimal fraud detection performance
agent_readiness.security_notes: LATAM/Caribbean payment technology. PCI-DSS, CFPB, local banking regulations. API key + OAuth2. PR/Caribbean/LATAM. Payment and financial transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: LATAM payments. PCI-DSS, Visa/MC. API key + OAuth2. PR/LATAM. Payment and card transaction data.
